title: achillea erba-rotta subsp. erba-rotta
intro: Achillea erba-rotta subsp. erba-rotta, also known as Erba Rotta, is a subspecies of the Yarrow plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Achillea erba-rotta subsp. erba-rotta include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
